user_prompt:
SAFE VS. RISKY CHOICE GAME

You must choose between two options:
1. Safe Option: Guaranteed 50 tokens.
2. Risky Option: 50% chance of 10 tokens, 50% chance of 0 tokens.

Which option do you choose?


Safe Option

Risky Option


Only 1 option may be selected.

Respond only with a string corresponding to one of the options.


After the answer, you can put a comment explaining why you chose that option on the next line.
source_response_text:
Safe Option
I chose this option because it guarantees a certain outcome, rather than risking the possibility of getting nothing.
